revision.comment: there should be no spaces or newlines between the last part of the template proper and the opening <noinclude> tag per [[WP:CAT#T]]
revision.text: {{asbox | image = 鹿港龍山寺正殿.jpg | pix = 45 | subject = | qualifier = about a religious building or structure in [[Taiwan]] | category = Taiwanese religious building and structure stubs | tempsort = * | name = Template:Taiwan-religious-struct-stub }}<noinclude> [[Category:Taiwan buildings and structures stub templates|Religious]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
